reasoning: This animation sequence aims to depict the gentle, deliberate movements often associated with older adults.  The sequence will focus on a slow, graceful raising of the hands, perhaps to indicate a thoughtful pause or a gesture of peace.  The movement should avoid abrupt changes and instead emphasize a sense of calm and wisdom. The arms start relaxed at the sides, then slowly raise, pausing slightly before returning to the relaxed position.  The wrists will remain slightly turned to convey a sense of gentle composure. This will be a three-frame sequence, emphasizing the simplicity and considered nature of the gesture.
